---
name: Field Report
about: Send back a street photo, bus stop audit, dead wall report, neighborhood line, or proof from the city.
title: "[Field] "
labels: field-report
assignees: ""
---

## Place

Name the street, stop, wall, route, block, corridor, building, or neighborhood.

## Proof

Add a photo, short description, link, or field note.

## What Is Missing

What should the city do here?

## Line

Write the public line if you have one.

Example:

`[PLACE] is not a fragment. It needs [MISSING PIECE]. Build the body.`

## Source

Add a source if this includes a factual claim.
